ai_summary: Validate unit cell lattice parameters (a-axis and c-axis lengths in Angstroms) for hexagonal and rhombohedral minerals from crystallographic databases (ICDD PDF-4 / RRUFF).
general_notes: All minerals crystallize in hexagonal or trigonal (rhombohedral R) symmetry and are described using hexagonal axes. Parameters are for the room-temperature (298 K) low-pressure polymorph. Values from ICDD PDF-4+ / RRUFF project / NIST crystal data. The a-axis and c-axis are the two independent lattice parameters (b=a for hexagonal). Express in Angstroms to 4 decimal places.

columns.name: Mineral
columns.notes: Mineral name with formula and polymorph prefix in parentheses (e.g. Corundum (alpha-Al2O3)). Use the Greek letter prefix to specify polymorph unambiguously.

columns.name: a-axis (Angstrom)
columns.notes: Hexagonal a lattice parameter in Angstroms at room temperature and ambient pressure. Source: ICDD PDF-4+ or RRUFF. 4 decimal places.

columns.name: c-axis (Angstrom)
columns.notes: Hexagonal c lattice parameter in Angstroms at room temperature and ambient pressure. Source: ICDD PDF-4+ or RRUFF. 4 decimal places.
